goal: count_prime_factor(p, falling_product(n, k)) = falling_product_prime_count_sum(p, n, k)

proof: not forall(x0: Nat) { not x0.is_prime or count_prime_factor(x0, a) <= count_prime_factor(x0, b) } or 0 = b or 0 = a

function(x0: Nat) { not x0.is_prime or count_prime_factor(x0, a) <= count_prime_factor(x0, b) }(w0)
